behavior_summary: This script implements the Hydros (Water Titan) NPC: a short U8P_HYDROS::look/inspect handler and a menu-driven interaction that can change Hydros' hostility state, spawn visual/scene objects, and ultimately free Hydros (triggering hostile behavior).
U8P_HYDROS::look is a simple 'examine' handler that displays the short description "Water Titan" and ends.

U8P_HYDROS::use constructs a dynamic conversation menu (local8), presents options, captures the player's choice (local5), and branches. Branching depends on global flags including hydrosFree, metHydros, hydrosBegged, hydrosPissed and a condition getPowerAO. Options include identify/apologize/beg/refuse/request power/free or leave; choices set/clear flags and may spawn items or sequences.

Several helper functions (U8P_HYDROS::func0D5F .. U8P_HYDROS::func124F) manage creation and frame-based animation/state for temporary items used in cinematic or visual effects. U8P_HYDROS::func13FB is the canonical 'Hydros freed' sequence: it announces freedom, sets hydrosFree, spawns an external process (likely hostile behavior), calls teardown (U8P_HYDROS::func0F0F), and unfreezes the avatar.
notable_control_flow: Entry to U8P_HYDROS::use first checks hydrosFree; if true it immediately runs the freed sequence (U8P_HYDROS::func13FB) rather than normal dialogue.

U8P_HYDROS::use dynamically assembles the menu array local8 with MenuSet/MenuAdd/MenuUnion/MenuRemove based on metHydros, hydrosPissed, hydrosBegged, and getPowerAO, then presents it in a conversation loop and routes on strcmp(local5, ...).

Apology branches clear hydrosPissed (write) and continue dialogue; 'freeing' branches set hydrosFree and spawn external FREE::* processes then run teardown helpers (U8P_HYDROS::func0F0F) to advance/clean item frames and remove temporary objects.

Visual/animation helpers follow a chain: U8P_HYDROS::func1003 -> U8P_HYDROS::func105F -> U8P_HYDROS::func10EE / U8P_HYDROS::func114F -> U8P_HYDROS::func11AB -> U8P_HYDROS::func124F (and others). These read Item::getFrame, set Item::setFrame, occasionally spawn FREE::* processes, and U8P_HYDROS::use suspend yields to step animation over time.
open_questions: Exact gameplay consequence of freeing Hydros for the player's long-term progression (beyond immediate spawn of hostile behavior) is not explicit here — e.g., whether rewards or quest state changes occur.
Precise semantics and allowed values of hydrosFree (0x01 vs 0x02) and whether other systems read the same flag for different semantics (inferred but not fully confirmed).
The external spawn targets FREE::func1C8B and FREE::func1C19 appear to control hostile or follow-up behavior; their concrete behaviors are external and unknown from this file.
Meaning and source of getPowerAO condition used to gate the 'power' menu option: whether it's an ability check, a quest flag, or an inventory condition is inferred but not proven.

main_function.name: U8P_HYDROS::look
main_function.purpose: Provide the short examine/"U8P_HYDROS::look at" description for the Hydros NPC and terminate the U8P_HYDROS::look process.
entry_conditions: Invoked when the player uses the 'U8P_HYDROS::look' (examine) action on the Hydros NPC (U8P_HYDROS::look event/processType 0x0208).

function_map.name: U8P_HYDROS::use
function_map.role: conversation/dialogue manager; builds menu, branches on choices, sets/clears conversation flags and triggers sequences including freeing Hydros

function_map.name: U8P_HYDROS::func0D5F
function_map.role: creates/prepares an item (Item::legal_create) and cycles its frame; used by placement/visual helpers

function_map.name: U8P_HYDROS::func0DDB
function_map.role: manage item placement and initial frame state; computes offsets and calls creation helper

function_map.name: U8P_HYDROS::func0EA7
function_map.role: small frame/state transition utility for an item

function_map.name: U8P_HYDROS::func0F0F
function_map.role: teardown/transition helper invoked when dialogue ends or Hydros is freed; cleans up spawned items and advances frames

function_map.name: U8P_HYDROS::func1003
function_map.role: frame progression helper; inspects and increments item frames, delegates to U8P_HYDROS::func105F

function_map.name: U8P_HYDROS::func105F
function_map.role: animation/state-step helper that may spawn external processes and call U8P_HYDROS::func10EE

function_map.name: U8P_HYDROS::func10EE
function_map.role: frame transition utility that sets frames based on current value

function_map.name: U8P_HYDROS::func114F
function_map.role: frame advancement wrapper that delegates to U8P_HYDROS::func11AB when reaching a threshold

function_map.name: U8P_HYDROS::func11AB
function_map.role: animation-stage helper that may spawn and ultimately call U8P_HYDROS::func124F

function_map.name: U8P_HYDROS::func124F
function_map.role: final/alternate frame setter used for reset/cleanup of item visuals

function_map.name: U8P_HYDROS::func12B0
function_map.role: creates and pops one or more items into the world at offsets and spawns per-item helpers (used during certain dialogue outcomes)

function_map.name: U8P_HYDROS::func13FB
function_map.role: canonical 'Hydros freed' sequence: announces freedom, sets hydrosFree, spawns external hostile behavior, calls teardown, and unfreezes the player

internal_calls.purpose: Positioning/placement of visual items used during dialogue or responses (menu choices that spawn objects).
Transition/teardown after freeing or ending a dialogue branch; cleanup of visual state and temporary items.
Create/pop items into the world as part of specific dialogue outcomes (e.g., 'Too bad.' or other responses).
Run the freed sequence when hydrosFree is already set or when the player chooses to free Hydros.
Delegate to item creation/preparation helper after computing position offsets.
Invoke a small frame/state transition helper as part of item visual progression.
Delegate next-stage frame handling when a specific frame threshold is reached (0x15 -> 0x16).
Call frame-setting helper when a small local counter reaches a threshold (final stage of that chain).
Delegate to the next animation stage when item frame equals a particular value (0x13).
Finalize or reset item frame/state as part of the animation/cleanup chain.
Post-create setup of created items (called after Item::create/pop).
Invoke teardown/visual cleanup after executing the freed announcement and spawning follow-up processes.

external_calls.purpose: Create or legally instantiate an item prototype and return a handle for later frame updates.
Query and manipulate item animation frames and positions for visual/placement logic across many helpers.
Create item entities and place them into the world at coordinates computed from an anchor item.
Start external processes (likely hostile or post-release behavior) when animation thresholds or freeing events occur.
Unfreeze the player avatar at the end of the freeing sequence (setAvatarInStasis(0x00)).
Change background music during a cinematic or dramatic sequence (inferred usage around freeing).
Yield/tick delays used throughout for timing animation and synchronizing with spawned processes.
Set a status flag on a created item (0x20) to change its behavior or visibility after creation.

reads.name: hydrosFree
reads.likely_effect: Gate: when true the script runs the freed sequence instead of normal dialogue (Hydros already freed).

reads.name: metHydros
reads.likely_effect: Indicates whether player has identified Hydros; controls different menu options and greeting text.

reads.name: hydrosBegged
reads.likely_effect: Tracks whether the player begged Hydros previously and alters available dialogue branches/options.

reads.name: hydrosPissed
reads.likely_effect: Marks Hydros' angry state which restricts menu options and changes replies until cleared (apology branch clears it).

reads.name: getPowerAO
reads.likely_effect: A gating condition (likely an ability or quest-state check) used to decide whether Hydros offers a 'power' option.

writes.name: metHydros
writes.likely_effect: Set when player identifies Hydros so subsequent interactions U8P_HYDROS::use the 'met' dialog branch.

writes.name: hydrosPissed
writes.likely_effect: Cleared (set to 0) in apology branch to reduce hostility.

writes.name: hydrosFree
writes.likely_effect: Set to indicate Hydros has been freed (value observed 0x02) so future interactions take the freed path.

writes.name: local1
writes.likely_effect: Transient conversation marker used within U8P_HYDROS::use to promise player aid if Hydros is freed; a temporary/write-only conversational flag.

quick_facts.behavior_summary_one_liner: This script implements the Hydros (Water Titan) NPC: a short U8P_HYDROS::look/inspect handler and a menu-driven interaction that can change Hydros' hostility state, spawn visual/scene objects, and ultimately free Hydros (triggering hostile behavior).
